title: Coded Graphic Character Set Global Identifier (0x01)
description: Layout for triplet 0x01: GCSGID and CPGID fields as defined in the MO:DCA table.
notes: Offsets in this layout are relative to the triplet start. Tlength (offset 0) and Tid (offset 1) are not mapped here.

elements.name: GCSGID
elements.description: Graphic Character Set Global Identifier (CODE, 2 bytes). Specifies the Graphic Character Set Global Identifier. Value X'FFFF' indicates the code page form.

elements.name: CPGID
elements.description: Code Page Global Identifier (CODE, 2 bytes). Specifies the Code Page Global Identifier for the character set.
